ValidationRule.description: When Type is Equipment, Equipment Description must be filled in and at least one Equipment record must be linked to move to Submitted.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Submitted"), ISPICKVAL(Type, "Equipment"), OR( ISBLANK(Equipment__c), Equipment_Count__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Equipment Description must be filled in and at least one Equipment record must be linked to submit an Equipment deal.
